sidebar.name: Shlomi Nugarker
sidebar.location: From Tel Aviv · open to a role or a project
sidebar.description: I turn ideas into products that work — fast, clean, easy-to-maintain websites and apps. If you have something that needs a developer who takes ownership from idea to launch, I'm here for it.

about.heading: A bit about me.
about.lead_1: I'm a full-stack developer from Israel, building websites and apps
about.end_to_end_tip: Server, client, and everything in between.
about.lead_2: — from the server and database to the screen the user sees.
about.body: What matters to me is bringing real value: clean code that's easy to maintain and extend, fast performance, and attention to the small details that make the difference. I like taking ownership of a task and seeing it through. Here are a few tools I work with, fueled by

services.heading: How I can help.
services.description: From the first idea to a live, stable product — I cover the whole development pipeline. Here are the areas where I can bring value.

web_apps.title: Web Applications
web_apps.description: I build the whole app, start to finish — the logic, the data, and the screens the user interacts with.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Clean, fast interfaces with React and Next.js that are easy to use and look great on any screen.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Stable servers and APIs with Node.js, connected to the right database for the job.

databases.title: Data & Integrations
databases.description: Connecting databases and third-party services — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase and more.

works.heading: A few things I've built.
works.description: Some projects I've worked on recently. Each one built from scratch.

makeble.title: Makeble
makeble.description: An AI-powered website builder — describe what you want in plain English or Hebrew and it generates, previews and deploys a Next.js app live. Built with a Monaco editor and one-click deploy. "Describe it. Ship it."

wanderly.title: Wanderly
wanderly.description: A social network for travelers — plan multi-stop trips, share them as posts, and layer community routes onto an interactive map. Integrates Claude AI for itinerary generation and real-time Socket.IO for a live feed.

roga.title: Roga Events
roga.description: A bilingual (Hebrew/French) marketing site for a corporate wellness company. A multi-page site with full RTL support, service pages statically generated from Markdown, image optimization, and thorough SEO (JSON-LD, Open Graph). Built with accessibility and performance in mind.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.body: Looking for a developer for a project or a role, or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you and see how I can help. Reach out on

error.500_message: An unexpected error occurred on our end. Try refreshing, or head back home.
